description:
Can we draft some ideas of where Justin Hosman can place his satellite office to get "the best bang for [his] buck"? We'll bring him those initial recommendations, then see about narrowing it down further based on his intake data.

Thank you!

description: Ethan, let's get him callrail numbers set up on Tuesday. Let's sync up to get it knocked out.

Corey brought up on our monthly call that we need to get SAH set up with an LSA account. I'll be the liason for you and the client. Just let me know if you need anything else from me.

title: Swapping number and code snippet check
description:
Request: please check the site to make sure the code snippet is correct and we're getting proper attribution.
URL: https://sahlegal.com/ 

Issue: The number on the header and footer (801-816-3999) should swap to the same number (801-816-3999), but on the back end in CallRail what we aren't seeing is the calls being sent to the website pool numbers associated with their main number. 

Here's the code: 
<script type="text/javascript" src="//cdn.callrail.com/companies/639212093/014c9957b8f1e78ff4f1/12/swap.js"></script> 

Thanks much!

title: Lead Docket Integration
assignees: Bogdan Zakharchyshyn, Den, Jordan, Keith Bruss
description:
Hi, seeking help with the request below. The client's Lead Docket optimizer reached out with the info below.

Request: they would like SAH's leads to come into Lead Docket directly from webhook. 

Here is the info that they sent:

We do this by providing an endpoint that you can post the submissions/leads to. I am including the endpoint below - it can be clicked on to see the existing field names and post instructions. I can also add or edit field names as needed once a test is sent in. 

Endpoint URL: https://hosmanadams.leaddocket.com/opportunities/form/5 

Please do let me know if there is anything else that is needed so we can ask their account manager.

Thanks so much!

title: Set up an introductory call with Ryan regarding Meta ads
description:
Hi ,

Just a reminder, in our last meeting with SAH, you said to have an introductory call with Ryan about Meta ads for them. We're setting up the LSA account. Did you want to share Ryan's email, and I can do the intro call?

title: Should we renew the PR campaign?
description:
It seems we've been missing updates from One PR lately. mentioned that we probably hit the 12-link threshold. We might need to consider renewing our agreement. What are your thoughts? Should we go ahead with the renewal, or would you prefer to start fresh with SAH and the new vendor? Let me know!

Cc:

title: Contacting Prompt Watch
description:
Hi Corey,

We got a ticket inline with the last meeting with the client. Its to call Prompt Watch to determine the upgrade costs for monitoring multiple clients, as SAH would like to implement this service.

Thank you very much.

CC

title: Exploring PR partnership
description:
Hi Clayton,

This is inline w/ their last progress call. Opening up a discussion to discuss how you and Corey will arrange a meeting with Amanda, Marco's PR contractor.

Additionally, once it's scheduled with Amanda, please should mention the PR potential with Justin Hosman from SAH.

I have set the due date to next week but please adjust if needed so it can be before their next monthly meeting.

If we need more info please let us know we can seek help from their AM.

Thanks much!

CC

title: New Phone Number Added on GBP
description:
Hey ,

I just saw on the client's GBP that "Google" added a secondary number (801) 999-1506.

I do not see this number anywhere on their site, but did find it on their Facebook profile. 
Can you please help me confirm if this number is still accurate and should be on the GBP now?

title: Reviews page
assignees: Bogdan Zakharchyshyn, Clayton Coombs, Den, Jordan, Keith Bruss, Predrag
description:
https://sahlegal.com/reviews/
I wouldn't keep this page, it doesn't bring traffic (2 views in the last 12 months)
I would integrate these reviews in other parts of the site - or better yet, embed Google reviews instead, they have over 300
